headline: Co-founder @ Graphite | Growth Advisor
summary: I help companies build and execute organic growth strategies.  What I do:  Product Management, Product Strategy, Product Optimization, Growth Strategy, User Acquisition, User Retention, User Growth, Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), Mobile Marketing, Online Marketing, Marketing Automation, Data Analysis, Analytics, Business Intelligence (BI), Email Marketing, Marketing Strategy, Search Engine Marketing (SEM), Landing Page Optimization, Interactive Marketing, Digital Marketing, Direct Marketing, Community Strategy, Email Outreach.
organization_description_1: 500 Global is a venture capital firm with over $2.7B in Assets Under Management that invests early in founders building fast-growing technology companies. We focus on markets where technology, innovation, and capital can unlock long-term value and drive economic growth.   500 Global has backed over 5,000 founders representing more than 2,600 companies operating in 80 countries. Our portfolio includes 51 companies valued at over $1 billion and 140 companies valued at over $100 million.   Our 140+ plus team members are located in more than 15 countries and bring experience as entrepreneurs, investors, and operators from some of the world’s leading technology companies.
position_description_1: I am a small LP in the 500 Global funds focused in LATAM, and a mentor on Product and Growth Strategy for the 500 Global community.
organization_description_2: Graphite is a Vertical AI Growth Agency that helps companies like Webflow, Notion, MasterClass, and Captions drive sustainable revenue growth via SEO, content and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization).
position_description_2: Graphite is a boutique growth agency that builds scalable growth engines for consumer tech companies. We help companies like MasterClass, Honey, Ticketmaster and Thumbtack.
organization_description_3: Code for Venezuela is organizing the Venezuelan diaspora and leveraging their connections with the Silicon Valley technology ecosystem to leapfrog technology adoption and entrepreneurship in Venezuela.   We believe we can tap into the immense human capital of our diaspora and funnel it towards effective initiatives that align with the needs of the country.
position_description_3: Code for Venezuela is a Non-profit organization enabling the Venezuelan expat community to effectively work on initiatives tackling the country's most pressing issues.
